languages.text: После смерти в одном из боев Иждриг Батошски стал негласным святым для своих людей. Его лик, почитаемый как священный, по слухам приносил удачу и помогал в борьбе с собственными слабостями. Долгие годы одно его имя, произнесенное вслух, считалось защитой от ересей.

After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.
languages.original_text: После смерти в одном из боев Иждриг Батошски стал негласным святым для своих людей. Его лик, почитаемый как священный, по слухам приносил удачу и помогал в борьбе с собственными слабостями. Долгие годы одно его имя, произнесенное вслух, считалось защитой от ересей.

His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

languages.text: イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは戦死後、民衆の間に事実上の聖人として崇められた。彼の肖像画は神聖なものとされ、幸運をもたらし、弱き己を克服する助けとなるという噂が流れた。彼の名前を口に出すだけで異端から守られると信じられ、長い間続いた。
languages.original_text: After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

traits.locale_text: イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは戦死後、民衆の間に事実上の聖人として崇められた。彼の肖像画は神聖なものとされ、幸運をもたらし、弱き己を克服する助けとなるという噂が流れた。彼の名前を口に出すだけで異端から守られると信じられ、長い間続いた。

languages.text: 在一场血战中阵亡后，伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基成了他人民心中的圣徒。他的肖像被尊为圣物，据传能带来好运，还有助于对抗自身的软弱。在之后的许多年里，人们相信，只要大声念出他的名字，就足以抵御异端的侵蚀。
languages.original_text: After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

traits.locale_text: 在一场血战中阵亡后，伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基成了他人民心中的圣徒。他的肖像被尊为圣物，据传能带来好运，还有助于对抗自身的软弱。在之后的许多年里，人们相信，只要大声念出他的名字，就足以抵御异端的侵蚀。

languages.text: Après sa mort au champ d'honneur, Izdrig Batoshski fut élevé au rang de saint par son peuple. On racontait que les objets à son effigie, considérés comme sacrés, portaient bonheur et aidaient les gens à lutter contre leurs faiblesses. Pendant de longues années par la suite, on attribua même des vertus protectrices à son nom, que l'on prononçait à voix haute pour se garder de l'hérésie.
languages.original_text: After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

traits.locale_text: Après sa mort au champ d'honneur, Izdrig Batoshski fut élevé au rang de saint par son peuple. On racontait que les objets à son effigie, considérés comme sacrés, portaient bonheur et aidaient les gens à lutter contre leurs faiblesses. Pendant de longues années par la suite, on attribua même des vertus protectrices à son nom, que l'on prononçait à voix haute pour se garder de l'hérésie.

languages.text: Tras su muerte en batalla, Izdrig Batoshski se convirtió en un santo para su gente, a efectos prácticos. Su imagen, adorada como sagrada, daba buena suerte y ayuda en la lucha contra las debilidades propias, según se decía. Durante muchos años, se creía que decir su nombre en voz alta era una protección efectiva contra la herejía.
languages.original_text: After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

traits.locale_text: Tras su muerte en batalla, Izdrig Batoshski se convirtió en un santo para su gente, a efectos prácticos. Su imagen, adorada como sagrada, daba buena suerte y ayuda en la lucha contra las debilidades propias, según se decía. Durante muchos años, se creía que decir su nombre en voz alta era una protección efectiva contra la herejía.

languages.text: Savaşlardan birinde ölümünün ardından İzdrig Batoshski, halkı arasında fiili bir aziz hâline geldi. Kutsal saygı gören suretinin şans getirdiği ve kişinin kendi zayıflıklarına karşı savaşında yardım ettiği söylentileri yayıldı. Ölümünden uzun yıllar sonra bile sadece adını yüksek sesle anmanın, kâfirliğe karşı bir koruma sağladığına inanılıyordu.
languages.original_text: After his death in one of the battles, Izdrig Batoshski became a de facto saint among his people. His likeness, revered as sacred, was rumoured to bring good luck and aid in the fight against one's own weaknesses. For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

traits.locale_text: Savaşlardan birinde ölümünün ardından İzdrig Batoshski, halkı arasında fiili bir aziz hâline geldi. Kutsal saygı gören suretinin şans getirdiği ve kişinin kendi zayıflıklarına karşı savaşında yardım ettiği söylentileri yayıldı. Ölümünden uzun yıllar sonra bile sadece adını yüksek sesle anmanın, kâfirliğe karşı bir koruma sağladığına inanılıyordu.

languages.text: Nachdem Izdrig Batoshski in einer Schlacht gefallen war, wurde er von seinem Leuten als Heiliger verehrt. Sein nun als heilig geltendes Antlitz brachte angeblich Glück und Hilfe im Kampf gegen die eigene Schwäche. Noch Jahre später glaubten seine Anhänger, allein seinen Namen laut auszusprechen, würde vor Ketzerei schützen.

For many years after, just speaking his name aloud was believed to be protection against heresy.

Sein nun als heilig geltendes Antlitz brachte angeblich Glück und Hilfe im Kampf gegen die eigene Schwäche. Noch Jahre später glaubten seine Anhänger, allein seinen Namen laut auszusprechen, würde vor Ketzerei schützen.
